text:
On Thu, Sep 21, 2000 at 01:17:58PM -0400, Brandon Fosdick wrote:
> >Synopsis:       update graphics/giram to 0.1.7
[...]
> *** Makefile    Thu Sep 21 12:51:28 2000
> --- Makefile.orig       Thu Sep 21 13:11:35 2000
> *************** PORTNAME=       giram
> *** 9 ****
> ! PORTVERSION=  0.1.7
> --- 9 ----
> ! PORTVERSION=  0.1.6

Next time try doing the diff the other way around, and including a MD5
checksum update.  :)
